entries.item: .t-* utility classes do not yet consume the --type-* role tokens (values duplicated in src/index.css)
entries.decision: F1 shipped tokens only to avoid behavioral risk; the .t-* refactor rides the F3 primitive ports where each class is re-verified
entries.upgradeTrigger: F3 net-new-primitives PR opens (the ports consume --type-* and prove the values)

entries.item: --brand-shadow-* call sites not yet migrated to canonical --shadow-*
entries.decision: Two shadow families coexist deliberately; deprecation direction documented in src/tokens.css comment (F1)
entries.upgradeTrigger: Phase Z consolidation closeout (per-surface retirement sweep)

entries.item: Legacy transition-duration-[120ms|180ms|400ms] literals across src/ not yet migrated to var(--dur-*) motion tokens
entries.decision: Motion tokens ratified as canonical (F2a); legacy literals stay valid outside @ds-rebuilt scope to avoid a repo-wide churn PR
entries.upgradeTrigger: Phase Z consolidation closeout, or earlier per-surface as each surface is rebuilt
